name: Run your Own Vault-Tec Vault
description:
Hiya folks!

Had this idea for a while, but wasn't quite sure how to do it. Alright, here's for the in-universe bit.

Congratulations, Citizen!

You've been chosen as the overseer of Vault number [TO BE DETERMINED]. As Overseer, your responsibilities include:

• Planning a vault

• Running a successful society after total atomic annihilation

• Managing population

• Managing supplies

• Fulfilling any requests made by Vault-Tec Industries

• Building a better life, underground.

We wish you luck in your journey to make a better day after.

For more information, these training videos should be of use to you:

S.P.E.C.I.A.L Videos:

https://youtu.be/26UDmZRCbm0?si=W0exJL8zSULCy8sc

Videos for Sales Associates:

The Winning Team!

https://youtu.be/n5VlB4PNje4si=2ZCa7CakSt6pDxCo

Follow Your No's

https://youtu.be/WHvaAN5lLVM?si=OtpKKQYX-OdrIOTO

Welcome Home

https://youtu.be/vcziZOImq7I?si=_J1hmmXtMmxgtNwu

Meet Me in Coswald

https://youtu.be/PeUykHwZJB0?si=6y6p2QOEoHMBFMGp

Steer the Ship!

https://youtu.be/6ocP_mP0Pjw?si=TlrBW7FDPuhVF12l

And finally, the music from our (patent pending) in-vault radio system!

Vault Radio Option One

https://youtu.be/bGIapmHP15g?si=IDwt1fMkYiisQUpG

Vault Radio Option Two

https://youtu.be/IKO-Uf_GyYM?si=W7oh0ER1ZTW4tfTo

Vault-Tec thanks you for your compliance in the Societal Preservation Program.

Kindest regards, Vault-Tec Industries

(Just a suggestion, put your choices in the chat memory, so things don't get messed up.)
creator: DookLaRuefan
